# MCP Conformance Tests - Version Negotiation
# Tests for protocol version compatibility and negotiation

# ============================
# BASIC VERSION NEGOTIATION
# ============================

# TEST 1: Server Accepts Latest Protocol Version
# Server should accept the latest version if supported
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2025-03-26
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Client requests latest version
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"id":1'
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26"'

# TEST 2: Server Negotiations Different Version
# Server should respond with a different supported version if requested version not supported
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2024-11-05
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Client requests version the server doesn't support
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"id":2'
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"'
! stdout '"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26"'

# TEST 3: Server Supports Multiple Versions
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2024-11-05,2025-03-26
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Client requests one of the supported versions
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"id":3'
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"'

# TEST 4: Server Returns Latest Supported Version
# When client requests unsupported version, server should respond with latest supported version
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2023-05-01,2024-11-05
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Client requests version the server doesn't support
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"id":4'
stdout '"result":'
# Should return the latest version it supports
stdout '"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"'
! stdout '"protocolVersion":"2023-05-01"'

# ============================
# INCOMPATIBLE VERSIONS
# ============================

# TEST 5: No Common Version
# Server should still respond with its supported version even if incompatible
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2020-01-01,2021-02-02 --strict-versions
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Client requests a version the server doesn't support
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":5,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"id":5'
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":"2021-02-02"'

# TEST 6: Completely Invalid Version Format
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2025-03-26 --strict-versions
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Client provides invalid version format
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":6,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"1.0.0","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"id":6'
stdout '"error":'
stdout '"code":-32602'
stdout '"message":"Unsupported protocol version"'
stdout '"data":'
stdout '"supported":["2025-03-26"]'
stdout '"requested":"1.0.0"'

# ============================
# VERSION-SPECIFIC BEHAVIOR
# ============================

# TEST 7: Version-Specific API Differences
# Different versions may have different API methods or parameters
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2024-11-05,2025-03-26 --version-specific-apis
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize with 2024-11-05 version
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":7,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Method available in 2024-11-05 version
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":8,"method":"2024_specific_method"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"2024-11-05 method called"'

# Method only available in 2025-03-26 should fail
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":9,"method":"2025_specific_method"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"error":'
stdout '"message":"Method not available in protocol version 2024-11-05"'

# Initialize a new server with 2025-03-26 version
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2024-11-05,2025-03-26 --version-specific-apis
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize with 2025-03-26 version
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":10,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26"'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Method available in both versions
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":11,"method":"2024_specific_method"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"2024-11-05 method called"'

# Method only available in 2025-03-26 should succeed now
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":12,"method":"2025_specific_method"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"2025-03-26 method called"'

# TEST 8: Version-Specific Message Formats
# Different versions may have different message format requirements
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2024-11-05,2025-03-26 --version-specific-formats
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize with 2024-11-05 version
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":13,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Call method that returns version-specific format
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":14,"method":"version_specific_response"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"2024_format_field":'
! stdout '"2025_format_field":'

# Initialize a new server with 2025-03-26 version
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2024-11-05,2025-03-26 --version-specific-formats
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Initialize with 2025-03-26 version
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":15,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26"'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Call method that returns version-specific format
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":16,"method":"version_specific_response"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"2025_format_field":'
! stdout '"2024_format_field":'

# ============================
# DRAFT VERSION TESTS
# ============================

# TEST 9: Draft Version Support
# Server should handle draft versions explicitly marked as such
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --supported-versions=2025-03-26,draft
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Client requests draft version
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":17,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"draft","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"VersionNegotiationClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"protocolVersion":"draft"'

setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Call draft-specific method
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":18,"method":"draft_specific_method"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"draft method called"'
